mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows or positive return frequency drops below 55% during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month rise in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the following 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE increases by > 0.2 percentage points month-over-month
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 60% of triggered instances or the signal loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of rising retail sales and declining inflation indicates robust consumer demand without price pressures, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant or the combined signal fails to outperform single-proxy baselines by > 5% Sharpe ratio.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth signals expanding corporate output capacity and improving profit margins, generating positive short-term S&P 500 returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during recovery phases or 5-day forward returns show no significant positive skew in distribution tests.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI increase above 0.4% triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity markets price in inflation passively and forward returns remain positive in > 58% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a decline in the unemployment rate confirms broad-based labor market strength, supporting corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict return direction with accuracy > 55% or interaction effects vanish in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts reflect strong consumer confidence and construction sector activity, which translates into higher corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 returns over a three-month horizon.
failure_condition: Housing starts lose predictive power for equity returns or the 60-day forward return correlation drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden drop in industrial production below its 6-month moving average indicates supply chain disruptions or demand shocks, triggering negative S&P 500 returns within 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Negative returns fail to materialize in > 50% of triggered instances or the signal shows no predictive edge in walk-forward validation.
